title: Gruffalo The 5" Stickman Keyring/Backpack Clip, Brown, 60574
features: Based on the book called Stick Man by Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
From the creators of 'The Gruffalo', 'The Gruffalo's child' and 'Room on the Broom'
Made only from the best plush materials
The perfect accessory for bags and keys
description: Product Description The Stick Family are always busy in their Family Tree. Now you can join in the fun too with this perfect accessory for bags and keys. Stick Man Backpack Clip has all the features of the famous Julia Donaldson best-selling, modern classic book character. Aurora World is the leading supplier of affordable, high quality gift products. The Stick Man is fully tested with European safety standards met and carries the CE label ensuring the product safe for children. Box Contains 1 x The Gruffalo- Stick Man Backpack Clip
